title: ceratocephalus acmella
intro: Ceratocephalus acmella, also known as paracress or prickly lettuce, is a type of flowering plant in the dill family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of ceratocephalus acmella include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. It can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and infusions, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
